creator: flz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: suspended->closed

I'm closing this PR because it's not about FreeBSD port of python, 
it's about FreeBSD not providing statvfs on 4.x. Since nobody seems 
to be interested in writing a wrapper that would use statfs, this 
PR is going to stay here as long as we support RELENG_4. 

I'll re-open the PR is somebody is interested in making the necessary 
work.
